As the smoke clears, you see
shaking, and looking hardly worse for wear!
Already defeated, the detonation on ".concat(n.getCombatName()," was of no use!")
The flames surge, licking at your target’s compatriots!
The shots blat off ".concat(n.getCombatName(),"’s shield, doing all the damage of raindrops on an umbrella.")
The shots thump into the target, dissolving into them.
It doesn’t seem to have any effect, though.

".concat(_.m.capitalize(n.getCombatPronoun("s"))," shudders, ").concat(n.getCombatPronoun("pa")," lips parting and ").concat(n.getCombatPronoun("pa")," gaze seeming to cloud. ").concat(_.m.capitalize(n.getCombatName())," is stupefied!")
You get your angles wrong however, and the grenade agonizingly whistles past your foe, detonating with a vicious but harmless clap beyond them.
It bounces with a clack right next to them and detonates with a violent gasp of air, rocking them to their core.
All the hair on your body immediately stands on end as the air becomes charged with electricity.

Slivers of electricity spark up the side of ".concat(a.isRobot()?"the thing’s hull, its":"".concat(a.getCombatPronoun("hisher")," side, ").concat(a.getCombatPronoun("hisher"))," systems desperately attempting to cope with the huge surge of current you’ve just forced into it. The smell of melting plastic hangs in the air.")
It didn’t seem to do any damage to the ".concat(a.getCombatName()," – but they look distinctly drained and shell-shocked now.")
The hit was hard enough to stun you!
Sadly, that target is immune to such tricks.
Your genitals drip with need as y
ou idly consider throwing the fight for a quick fuck.
! ".concat(_.m.capitalize(a.getCombatName(),!1)," twist").concat("PlayerCharacter"===a.getClassName()||a.isPlural?"":"s"," to catch ").concat(a.getCombatPronoun("himher"),"self at the last second!")
".concat(2===l?" one last time for good measure":"","!")

In a stunned and vulnerable state, [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|the bun] can’t stop you from closing the distance and biting at her lips and cheek. Because her neck isn’t available, you hope it can move fast through there! Watching her experience the familiar effects of venomous aphrodisiac, you allow yourself a tiny smile.
You don’t manage to get close enough to your opponent this time.

“Hrrgh -- unngh!” Something’s happened... [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|the laquine] felt that. She shuffles backwards, shoulder clutched tight, blood spitting from her mouth. Smoldering eyes gaze at you like the eternal, unblinking judgment of a statue. Well-struck; a decisive, powerful blow!

[pc.isChestGarbed|Shedding your [pc.chestCover], you|You] bring[pc.breastRowsRange 2| one of] your [pc.milkyNipples] up to your [pc.lips] and gulp the [pc.milkFlavor] liquid down until you are completely full.
Due to your extra milky ability, an unexpected burst of fluid fills your gullet and almost makes you choke on your drink!

Needing a boost, you reach to activate the Biological Stimulant Package. A sharp pain stings your back as needles inoculate you with experimental drugs! The glowing liquid spreads through your veins, making your heart race faster. Indomitable vigor fills your every cell, insulating you against kinetic blows and energy weapons, but the enhanced verse also leaves you feeling warm and open t new experiences.... You bite your [pc.lipsChaste], struggling to deal with your increased sensitivity. You need to finish this before your lusty thoughts can be turned against you!
A palpable sense of relief washes over you as you move to recharge your shielding. The laquine over-commits on her attack all the same,
, points the edge at you, and makes a cutthroat motion. As if you could ever forget why she’s here.

Keeping that hair trigger reflex in check, you don’t discharge the weapon until she stops moving for that split, heart-stopping second. BWOORSH! It connects! She lets out a bestial roar (in so much as her fragged vocal cords can manage) and lashes the lingering flames from her arms and legs fitfully. You only get a second to celebrate before she emerges from the scorched ground, ready to tear you asunder.

Nothing in the known universe can resist the power of raw, concentrated gravity. [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|This Jumper] is no exception -- she hits the ground with a bone-cracking thud. Her body shudders with unnatural exertion, the very strength animating her evaporating for the duration of your attack.\n\n\t\t\tAgainst all odds, she breaks out of the field, shakes the cricks from her body, and leers.
Disorientation in a can. You hurl out a flashbang; [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|the Jumper] casts a split-second glance at it and shields her eyes with an arm. PBWING!

Tracking the knife in the dark is substantially harder than a bright blue energy sword. No matter where you aim, no matter how patiently you seek it, you can’t dislodge the blade from the Jumper’s paw. Try anymore and she’ll probably reflect the shot back at you somehow.

Finding tar-black bunny’s paws as they manically flex and jerk and writhe proves to be one of your greatest challenges. The hand-eye coordination required by this stupendous achievement is beyond compare, but, fucking hell, you do it. Considering the variables with a sharpshooter’s efficacy, you snipe [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora’s|the laquine’s] gun from her grip, and the other when she reaches. The subsequent imbalance and stumbling grants you another opportunity: to loose that sword from her other hand. Inhale, count to two, exhale and clock her cold. Plingcksshh! The cryonic sword pinwheels into obscurity, some inner safety precaution disabling the lethal bits. “Ghaaaah!!” she yells, an enraged sound like someone trying not to make too much noise in the house at night. Although you hit her square in the wrist and hand respectively, no visible damage has been done, and rather than scrabble for her gear, she makes a horrifyingly mad dash in your direction, launching into a roundhouse kick strong enough to re-orbit a planet. You narrowly duck the brain-basher and get some distance. In her hands is a knife; in her eyes burns a primordial desire to kill.
Total invisibility may not be possible, but a hi-tech obscurant will do the trick. No sooner has light bended than

No sooner do you fling your fragmentary payload than [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|the laquina] morphs into a ball. The world quivers from the explosive impact. Yet, when the Jumper rises from her squat, she is no worse for the wear.\n\n\t\t\tKinetic attacks are next-to-useless against her! Change your tactics!

You allow [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|the Jumper] to whittle at your defenses, let her gain ground, until she walks into a tiger pit. One vicious coup-de-grace dodged, one kick square on her ass, you then hurl out your mag binders, their inner circuitries coming to life midair. “Nngg!?” Wide, suited wrists are captured in the anti-grav restraints that struggle to lift an amazon’s worth of muscle. Hefted from the ground, she struggles like a chained arch-devil to liberate herself. Seize this vulnerability, because your instruments weren’t built to take this kind of abuse!
and snap into place, wrapping you up. You are stunned!
You feel revitalized, but you better end this fight before your [pc.milkNoun]’s aphrodisiacs kick in...

At first it seems impossible, but your sheer brawn overpowers the killer laquine. There’s a tremble in her eyes that excites you, and then she pulls herself away, legs unbalanced. You stunned her... somehow!
But, inside her, there’s only the hunt and the need to hurt. She lurches back and thrusts you away, not much worse for the wear.
It didn’t manage to stun you.
You are staggered by the hail of fire!
You shudder and stop, temporarily paralyzed!
The lingering gravitic field will reduce all kinetic damage!
Your goggles cover your eyes from the blinding projectile and you avoid being blinded.",null,t
The big Jumper guards herself well from your blinding trick. Long, floppy ears ‘whap’ as she shakes the blear from her head. “Kfff... grrhh!” Better try something else...! ",null,t
You manage to avoid the blinding projectile.",null,t
".concat(_.m.capitalize(compressToList(i),!1)," are blinded by the luminous flashes.")
".concat(_.m.capitalize(compressToList(r),!1)," all manage to avoid the blinding projectile.")
".concat(_.m.capitalize(r[0],!1)," manage").concat(u?"":"s"," to avoid the blinding projectile.")
It had little effect on your automated foe!
You manage to shrug off the potentially debilitating hit.
Though you aren’t stunned, your the sheer damage you’re taking adds up.
You manage to avoid most of the projectiles, but one still impacts your arm, stinging you with a pinprick of pain. You yank it out, but its payload is already spent, injected inside you.
Two needles slam into your body, imparting bursts of searing pain when they penetrate your flesh. You yank them out in irritation, but whatever they contained is inside you now.
All three needles hit you before you can react.
You find yourself wondering what it would be like to slip into her puffy, double-clitted box.",null,a
“You... W-what the h-hell is this? Did you get tha... thaaaa-TT from one of the Vipers?!” comes a lewd cry, the lust obvious in ".concat(s.getCombatPronoun("hisher")," unsteady speech.")

When [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|the laquine] swings, you fling out your mag binders, their inner circuitries coming to life. The Jumper sees them coming a mile away, however, flicking each band aside with accurate kicks and punches. Damnit.
With an almost preternatural sense of self-preservation,
